calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Nov-29-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Devin Robinson appeared by telephone for Michael Rasmussen.

Mr. Devin stated that he believes he has provided courtesy copies of everything he has filed since September 12th as well as a revised order, and that he will have to check with his staff. The Petition to Establish Fact of Death is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
